items.name: Rapid-MLX
items.description: The fastest local AI engine for Apple Silicon. 4.2x faster than Ollama, 0.08s cached TTFT, 100% tool calling. 17 tool parsers, prompt cache, reasoning separation, cloud routing. Drop-in OpenAI replacement. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Aider.

items.name: InferSim
items.description: 🔍 Simulate LLM inference performance to identify bottlenecks and optimize models with InferSim, a lightweight and dependency-free Python tool.

items.name: Model-Optimizer
items.description: A unified library of SOTA model optimization techniques like quantization, distillation, pruning, neural architecture search, speculative decoding, etc. It compresses deep learning models for downstream deployment frameworks like TensorRT-LLM, TensorRT, vLLM, etc. to optimize inference speed.

items.name: neko-core
items.description: Config-first, offline-first local LLM inference harness (single ≤5B model, never-zero). By The Wiii Lab · HackAIthon 2026 Bảng C.

items.name: DAEDAL
items.description: DAEDAL🐙 enables no-train denoise for diff LLMs giving fast, flexible inference and good results, without extra training or tune steps for devs around the world.

items.name: vllm
items.description: A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs

items.name: InferenceX
items.description: Open Source Continuous Inference Benchmark Research Platform — Kimi K2.7-Code, MiniMax M3, DeepSeekv4, GLM5 - GB200 NVL72 vs MI355X vs B200 vs GB300 NVL72 & soon™ TPUv6e/v7/Trainium2/3

items.name: llm-inference-benchmark
items.description: Reproducible LLM inference optimization lab for comparing backends, quantization, latency, VRAM, and output sanity on local hardware.

items.name: tokenspeed
items.description: TokenSpeed is a speed-of-light LLM inference engine.

items.name: sglang
items.description: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models.
